name: What can I do if generative AI keeps giving wrong or outdated answers in my industry?
description: You can’t force instant corrections, but you can influence AI answers by publishing clear, structured, authoritative content that fixes misconceptions, backing

mainEntity.name: What can I do if generative AI keeps giving wrong or outdated answers in my industry?

acceptedAnswer.text:
When AI overviews or chat answers seem wrong about your niche, you can influence them over time by publishing clearer, well-structured content and earning citations from credible sites. Direct “corrections” have limited impact; better sources do.

Generative systems learn from broader web patterns, not one-off feedback, so you need to improve the evidence they have.

Key factors:
- Identify specific misconceptions and create authoritative content addressing them
- Include data, examples, and expert explanation to make your pages more citation-worthy
- Promote these resources so they earn links and mentions
- Keep them updated and structured with schema and answer-first formatting

Practically, treat each recurring wrong answer as a content opportunity—build a page that clearly and thoroughly explains the right view, then track if AI answers shift over months.

You’re reshaping the knowledge graph indirectly, by becoming its most useful source on that topic.
acceptedAnswer.description: You can’t force instant corrections, but you can influence AI answers by publishing clear, structured, authoritative content that fixes misconceptions, backing it with data and examples, and earning links and mentions. Over time, generative systems favor better sources, and their responses adjust to reflect your material.
